name: Russian Roulette: Online
short_description: "Russian Roulette: Online" is a pulse-pounding multiplayer survival game where speed and luck determine the victor. Dive into the chaos for an adrenaline-fueled showdown—only the fastest and luckiest will emerge victorious!
detailed_description:
DISCORD


About the Game

The main task is to survive



Online game for up to 15 people, each player has the right to pull the trigger only once per turn, pray to God that there would be a cartridge at that moment!

Plunge into the world of adrenaline with Russian Roulette: Online - a great online survival game where only the fastest and luckiest will emerge victorious. Immerse yourself in heart-stopping action as you take on up to fifteen other players in a battle for survival where every turn could be your last.

Luck and accuracy



In this game, luck and accuracy will determine your fate. The tension increases with every kill of your neighbor at the table, every pull of the trigger with an unpredictable roulette wheel. As the countdown begins, the pressure intensifies, and only the most experienced and lucky players will avoid the click of fate and a bullet to the head.

Balance on the brink between life and death, take part in a merciless struggle for survival, where quick reflexes and luck are the keys to victory. Who will be the last one standing when the smoke clears?

You're next!



Experience a thrilling mix of action, tension and unpredictability as you embark on an exceptional survival adventure in Russian Roulette: Online. Do you have what it takes to survive the longest and win this survival gambling game?

Enter the arena, feel the excitement and find out which of you will become the real survivor.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Hindi
